when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ @can(happen(undergoer=[q:some m:very.bad SOMETHING~THING !2], time=after@#NOW)) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=x2) ; @maybe(happen(undergoer=x2, time=after@#NOW)) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD)) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:someone,x3:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[q:some m:bad SOMETHING~THING !3], time=before@#NOW) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=x3) ; want(experiencer=#I, complement={ do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]) }) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD)) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:time] { @because(do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[SOMETHING~THING]), there-is(undergoer=x1)) ; think(experiencer=x2, quote=q{ see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=before@#NOW) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement={ see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=#NOW) }) ; @if(want(experiencer=#I, complement={ see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3 | @after(#NOW, there-is(undergoer=x3))]) }), @can(see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=x3))) }) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:something,x4:place] { @because(do(agent=[SOMEONE !2], undergoer=[SOMETHING~THING]), there-is(undergoer=x1)) ; there-is(undergoer=[d:other SOMETHING~THING !3]) ; be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=x1, topic=x3) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @can(know(experiencer=x2, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x3, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE !4]) }))) }
when-true refs[x1:someone] { die(undergoer=x1, time=before@#NOW) ; @not(live(undergoer=x1, time=#NOW)) ; @not(@can(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:time] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:event>)]) ; happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !3]) ; @when(happen(undergoer=x1), die(undergoer=[SOMEONE !2])) ; @after(x3, @not(live(undergoer=x2))) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:time] { @before(x2, happen(undergoer=x1)) ; @after(x2, @not(happen(undergoer=x1))) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ happen(undergoer=x1, time=before@x2) })) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:time] { happen(undergoer=x1, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !2]) ; @after(x2, @not(happen(undergoer=x1))) ; @can(know(experiencer=[PEOPLE], complement={ happen(undergoer=x1, time=before@#NOW) })) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:place] { @before(#NOW, @not(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=[d:some WHERE~PLACE !3]) }))) ; @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]), see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=x2, time=#NOW)) ; know(experiencer=x1, complement={ be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=x3) }, time=#NOW) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=before@#NOW) ; @not(know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW)) ; @not(@can(think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:someone,x4:time] { do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2, time=[d:some WHEN~TIME !4]) ; @before(x4, @can(say(agent=x1, quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) }))) ; @after(x4, @can(say(agent=[d:other SOMEONE !3], quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) }))) ; @after(x4, @not(@can(say(agent=x1, quote=q{ is-mine(undergoer=x2, possessor=#I) })))) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @before(#NOW, happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:death>) !2])) ; @because(happen(undergoer=x2), be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=<urn:kernel-v0:sad>)) ; think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, duration=#FOR-SOME-TIME) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ happen(undergoer=[q:some m:good SOMETHING~THING !2], time=before@#NOW) ; want(experiencer=#I, complement=x2) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=[d:other SOMETHING~THING], time=#NOW) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#GOOD)) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[part-of(x1)]) ; be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[q:one SOMETHING~THING]) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:someone,x3:something] { want(experiencer=x2, complement={ do(agent=x2, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !3]) }) ; @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]), @can(do(agent=x2, undergoer=x3))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @before(#NOW, @not(know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2))) ; @because(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2) }), do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING])) ; know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { say(agent=x1, topic=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:lie>)]) ; @because(say(agent=x1, topic=[q:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:lie>)]), @can(think(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=x1, quote=q{ be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[m:bad SOMEONE]) }))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:someone] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=[SOMEONE !2], addressee=[d:other SOMEONE !3], topic=x1) ; know(experiencer=x2, complement={ @not(true(undergoer=x1)) }) ; @because(want(experiencer=x2, complement={ think(experiencer=x3, quote=q{ true(undergoer=x1) }) }), say(agent=x2, addressee=x3, topic=x1)) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:someone] { be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=x2, manner=#NEAR) ; @not(be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=x2, manner=#FAR)) ; @if(be-somewhere(undergoer=[SOMEONE !3], locus=x2), @can(see(experiencer=x3, stimulus=x1))) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[part-of(x2)]) ; @if(@not(there-is(undergoer=x1)), @not(be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[d:the-same SOMETHING~THING]))) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:someone,x4:something] { be-spec(undergoer=x1, attribute=[WORDS]) ; say(agent=[SOMEONE !2], addressee=[d:other SOMEONE !3], topic=x1, quote=q{ @after(#NOW, do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !4])) ; know(experiencer=#I, complement={ want(experiencer=#YOU, complement=x4) }) ; @can(know(experiencer=#YOU, complement={ @after(#NOW, do(agent=#I, undergoer=x4)) })) }) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=before@#NOW) ; @because(know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=before@#NOW), @can(think(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW))) ; know(experiencer=x1, topic=x2, time=#NOW) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @because(think(experiencer=x1, quote=q{ happen(undergoer=[q:some m:bad SOMETHING~THING !2], time=before@#NOW) ; don't-want(experiencer=#I, complement=x2) ; @not(@can(do(agent=#I, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING]))) }), feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD)) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ happen(undergoer=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:learn>)]) }) ; @because(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]) }), do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING])) ; say(agent=x1, addressee=[d:other PEOPLE], topic=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { @because(do(agent=x1, undergoer=[q:many SOMETHING~THING]), happen(undergoer=[q:many kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:take>)])) ; don't-want(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], complement={ happen(undergoer=[d:some kind-of(<urn:kernel-v0:take>)]) }) ; don't-want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=[d:other PEOPLE], stimulus=x1) }) }

when-true refs[x1:something,x2:someone,x3:something] { @if(want(experiencer=[SOMEONE !2], complement={ do(agent=x2, undergoer=[q:some SOMETHING~THING !3]) }), @can(do(agent=x2, undergoer=x3, instrument=x1))) ; @because(there-is(undergoer=x1), @can(do(agent=x2, undergoer=[q:many m:more.good SOMETHING~THING]))) }
an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; it is very big; it does not live with people, it lives far from people; if someone is very near one, something very bad can happen to this someone

an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; many of them are small; it can move far above the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m], it can move in the {urn:molecule-v0:sky|sky} [m]; people can hear some of them at many times, this can feel good

a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; there are very many words inside it: people can see these words; when someone sees these words, this someone can know many things because of them; people want things of this kind because of this

a thing of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind because of this: things can be inside it; someone can {urn:molecule-v0:open|open} [m] it, someone can {urn:molecule-v0:close|close} [m] it; after someone does this, people cannot see the things inside it

someone of one kind: someone of this kind was {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born} a short time before now; the body of someone of this kind is small; someone of this kind cannot do many things; after a long time, someone of this kind is big, can do many things

someone does something of one kind to a thing; it is not like {urn:molecule-v0:open|open} [m]: it is the other way; before this, things can move into this thing, out of it; after this, things cannot move into it, out of it

things of one kind; people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make} things of this kind; things of this kind can be on someone's body; people want them on the body: because of them, other people cannot see all of the body, the body does not feel {urn:molecule-v0:cold|cold} [m]

something someone can feel in the body, someone can know it when the body touches a thing; {urn:molecule-v0:water|water} [m] can be like this at some times; it is not like something near {urn:molecule-v0:fire|fire} [m] feels; when all of someone's body feels it for a long time, it is very bad for the body

something of one kind; people can know it about a thing when they see this thing; two things can be the same in this way; someone cannot know it about a thing if this someone cannot see; there are many kinds of it

a time of one kind; when it is this time in a place, people in this place can see the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m] above them, people can see many things, people do many things; after this time, for some time people cannot see it; after this, this time happens one more time

an {urn:molecule-v0:animal|animal} [m] of one kind; many of them live with people, in the places where people live; when something happens near it, it does something, people can hear this from far; many people feel something good toward them, they feel something good toward people

someone does something of one kind with the {urn:molecule-v0:mouth|mouth} [m] to some things: for a short time these things are inside it, this someone does something to them inside it; after this, they are inside the body; people do this at many times; if someone does not do this for a long time, this someone dies

something of one kind, not a thing; people can see it; it moves; when someone is near it, this someone's body feels something; if it touches the body, something very bad happens to the body; if it touches things, something very bad can happen to these things
living things of one kind; they are very small; there are very many of them in one place on the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m]; when people move on them, the body feels something good

a part of someone's body; there are two of these parts, one on one side of the body, one on the other side; someone can do very many things with these parts; when someone wants to touch a thing, to {urn:kernel-v0:take|take} a thing, this someone can do it with this part

someone does something of one kind to someone else with the two {urn:molecule-v0:hand|hands} [m]: the two bodies touch for a short time; someone does it when this someone feels something very good toward this other someone; because of it, the other someone can feel something good

someone's body does something of one kind: the {urn:molecule-v0:mouth|mouth} [m] moves, other people can hear something because of it; someone does not do it because this someone wants it: it happens when this someone feels something very good; when other people hear it, they can feel something good

something of one kind; people cannot touch it; when it is in a place, people can see the things in this place; when it is not in a place, people cannot see the things in this place; it is in a place because of the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m], because of {urn:molecule-v0:fire|fire} [m], because of some things people {urn:kernel-v0:make|make}

someone of one kind, not a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m]: this someone lived for a long time before now; this someone is not a {urn:molecule-v0:woman|woman} [m]: a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m] cannot be {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born} from inside the body of someone of this kind
a part of someone's body; when someone says words, this part moves; things can be inside it for a short time; when something is inside it, this someone feels this thing

something of one kind; people can hear it; people do things because they want other people to hear it; when people hear it, they can feel something very good; at some times, when people hear it, they want to move the body, they want to say words at the same time

a time of one kind; when it is this time in a place, people in this place cannot see the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m], people cannot see many things; at this time people {urn:molecule-v0:sleep|sleep} [m]; after this time, there is {urn:molecule-v0:day|day} [m] one more time

someone does something of one kind to a thing (at many times with the {urn:molecule-v0:hand|hand} [m]); before this, things cannot move into this thing, out of it, people cannot see what is inside it; after this, things can move into it, out of it, people can see what is inside it

a thing of one kind; it is not living; there are many of these things on the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m], inside it; when the body touches one of these things, it feels not like other things: if someone does something to it, nothing happens to it; some are very big, some are very small
someone moves in a way of one kind: all parts of the body move; because someone moves like this, this someone can be in another place, far from this place, after a short time

someone's body is somewhere in a way of one kind: the body does not move, one part of the body touches the thing below it, the body is not far above this thing; someone is like this for some time when this someone does not want to move

a living thing of one kind; it is big; it is in one place at all times, it cannot move; part of it is inside the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m]; other parts are far above, people can see these parts; there are very many of these living things in some places

someone moves in a way of one kind: the body is above the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m], at all times one part of the body touches it; because someone moves like this, this someone can be in another place after some time; people move like this at many times

someone of one kind, not a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m]: this someone lived for a long time before now; a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m] can be {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born} from inside the body of someone of this kind
instance refs[x1:someone] { think(experiencer=x1) }

instance refs[x1:something] { there-is(undergoer=x1) ; move(undergoer=x1) ; say(agent=x1, duration=#MOMENT) ; hear(experiencer=#I, stimulus=x1, time=#NOW) ; be-somewhere(undergoer=#I, locus=x1) ; move(undergoer=x1, duration=#A-LONG-TIME) ; be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=x1) ; there-is(undergoer=x1, duration=#A-SHORT-TIME) ; happen(time=#NOW) ; say(agent=#YOU, addressee=x1, topic=x1, time=#NOW) ; think(experiencer=#I) ; want(experiencer=#I, complement=#I) }
instance refs[x1:someone] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) }) ; @after(#NOW, want(experiencer=x1, complement=x1, time=#NOW)) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:someone,x4:place] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#GOOD) }) ; @after(#NOW, say(agent=#YOU, topic=#YOU)) ; do(agent=[q:all m:very.bad SOMEONE !3], undergoer=x1, place=#HERE) ; @not(want(experiencer=x1, complement=x3, time=#NOW)) ; there-is(undergoer=[d:this x3], place=[SIDE !4]) ; be-somewhere(undergoer=[d:this SIDE], locus=[m:big x4]) }

when-true refs[x1:someone] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#GOOD) }) ; @more(#BAD) ; @because(do(agent=#YOU, comitative=#YOU, time=#NOW), happen(manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY)) ; @when(live(undergoer=x1, time=#NOW), don't-want(experiencer=x1, complement=#YOU)) ; true(undergoer=q{ want(experiencer=x1, complement=#YOU) }) ; @maybe(move(undergoer=#I, time=#NOW)) ; @can(happen(undergoer=x1, time=#NOW)) ; feel(experiencer=x1, time=before@#NOW) }
instance refs[x1:something] { @can(do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I)) }

instance refs[x1:someone,x2:someone,x3:someone] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I) }) ; want(experiencer=x1, complement=[q:many PEOPLE !2], time=#NOW, place=[PEOPLE !3], manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) }

instance refs[x1:something,x2:time] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I) }) ; be-spec(undergoer=[d:the-same x1], attribute=[d:this SOMEONE], time=[MOMENT !2]) ; do(agent=x2, time=after@#NOW) ; @can(do(agent=#YOU, time=#NOW)) }

instance refs[x1:something] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD) }) ; @more(#SMALL) ; @because(happen(), live(undergoer=x1)) ; @maybe(feel(experiencer=#YOU, attribute=#GOOD)) ; be-somewhere(undergoer=x1, locus=[d:other SOMETHING~THING]) ; @not(think(experiencer=#YOU, topic=x1, duration=#FOR-SOME-TIME, place=#HERE, manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY)) }
when-true refs[x1:someone] { @maybe(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) })) ; feel(experiencer=[q:all YOU]) }

instance refs[x1:someone,x2:something,x3:time] { @can(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) })) ; live(undergoer=[d:some x1]) ; @maybe(@can(see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=x1))) ; see(experiencer=[d:other I], stimulus=x1, duration=#FOR-SOME-TIME) ; want(experiencer=[m:very.small SOMETHING~THING !2], complement=[BODY]) ; @when(do(agent=[m:good WHEN~TIME !3], place=[d:some SIDE]), want(experiencer=[d:some m:big x1], complement=x2, time=x3)) }
relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ know(experiencer=x1, complement={ do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I) }) }) }
instance refs[x1:someone] { @not(@maybe(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ live(undergoer=x1) }))) }

relational refs[x1:someone,x2:something] { @can(know(experiencer=x1, complement={ @maybe(do(agent=x1, undergoer=#I)) })) ; true(undergoer=q{ don't-want(experiencer=x2, complement={ feel(experiencer=#YOU, attribute=#BAD) }, duration=#MOMENT) }, place=[part-of([MOMENT])]) ; do(agent=[d:this x1], manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) }
relational refs[x1:something,x2:someone] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ @can(want(experiencer=x1, complement={ want(experiencer=x1, complement={ live(undergoer=x1) }) })) }) }
instance refs[x1:something] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) }) }

relational refs[x1:something,x2:something,x3:something] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#GOOD) }) ; there-is(undergoer=[SIDE], time=#NOW) ; feel(experiencer=[d:this SOMETHING~THING !3], duration=#FOR-SOME-TIME) }

instance refs[x1:someone] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) }) ; hear(experiencer=[q:one WHERE~PLACE], stimulus=x1, manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) ; hear(experiencer=[d:this m:bad I], stimulus=x1) ; @not(be-somewhere(undergoer=#YOU, locus=x1)) ; die(undergoer=x1, manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) ; @maybe(be-somewhere(undergoer=#YOU, locus=x1, place=#HERE)) }

when-true refs[x1:someone,x2:someone] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ see(experiencer=x1, stimulus=#YOU) }) ; know(experiencer=[d:some PEOPLE !2], complement={ feel(experiencer=x2, attribute=#BAD) }) ; @after(#NOW, happen(undergoer=#YOU, place=#HERE)) ; @if(do(agent=x1, undergoer=x2), do(agent=x2, comitative=x1)) ; @when(live(undergoer=#YOU), live(undergoer=#YOU, place=#HERE)) ; @because(be-somewhere(undergoer=x2, locus=x2), think(experiencer=x2, topic=#YOU, time=#NOW)) ; don't-want(experiencer=x2, complement={ say(agent=x1) }) ; be-spec(undergoer=x2, attribute=[q:all m:good SOMEONE]) }
when-true refs[x1:someone] { feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#BAD, time=#NOW) ; be-somewhere(undergoer=#I, locus=x1, manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) ; hear(experiencer=#I, stimulus=#I) ; move(undergoer=x1) }

when-true refs[x1:someone] { do(agent=x1, time=#NOW) ; think(experiencer=x1, time=#NOW) ; live(undergoer=x1) ; move(undergoer=#YOU, time=#NOW, duration=#A-LONG-TIME) ; feel(experiencer=#I, attribute=#BAD) ; do(agent=x1, undergoer=x1, comitative=#YOU, place=#HERE) }

instance refs[x1:something] { see(experiencer=#I, stimulus=#I, place=#HERE, manner=#LIKE~AS~WAY) ; want(experiencer=x1, complement=x1, time=#NOW) ; think(experiencer=#YOU, topic=#I, time=#NOW) ; move(undergoer=x1, duration=#MOMENT, place=#HERE) ; think(experiencer=x1) ; want(experiencer=#YOU, complement=x1) ; live(undergoer=x1) ; don't-want(experiencer=x1, complement=#YOU, place=#HERE) }
instance refs[x1:something] { know(experiencer=x1, complement={ live(undergoer=x1) }) }

when-true refs[x1:someone] { want(experiencer=x1, complement={ feel(experiencer=x1, attribute=#GOOD) }) ; hear(experiencer=[d:some m:more.small MOMENT], stimulus=x1) ; @when(feel(experiencer=#I, duration=#A-LONG-TIME), want(experiencer=#I, complement=#I)) }
